pi_items.metadata_value: Bohai Sea / Yellow Sea coastline (Lat 38.0-42.0, Lon 117.0-125.0)

privileged_info_summary: The starting location is Sükhbaatar Square in Ulaanbaatar, Mongolia (approximately 47.9188°N, 106.9175°E). The nearest coastline is the Bohai Sea, located within the range of 37.1-41.0°N and 117.6-122.2°E. The actual straight-line distance between these locations is approximately 1,150-1,200 km.
